class mindxlib.rulelist.rulelist_SSRL.subProblemSolver(bitmap=None, patience_ratio=0.1, cc=10)¶

Bases: object

This class solve the problem |A\cap_{e\in S} e|-|B\cap_{e\in S} e|-lambda_0*(|C\cap_{e\in S} e|+lambda_1|S|) which equals to |ar{B}\cup_{e\in S} ar{e}|+lambda_0*|ar{C}\cap_{e\in S} e|-|ar{A}\cap_{e\in S} ar{e}|-lambda_0*lambda_1|S|

get_permutation(A, B, C, lambda_0, lambda_1)¶
initial_solution_1(A, B, C, lambda_0, lambda_1, M=16, K=3)¶
load_bitmap(bitmap, full_set)¶
local_search(A, B, C, lambda_0, lambda_1)¶
solve(A, B, C, lambda_0, lambda_1, lower_bound=None)¶
This function maximize

|A \cap x_1 \cap x_2 ...|-|B \cap x_1 \cap x_2 ...|-lambda_0(|C \cap x_1 \cap x_2 ...|+lambda_1 |X|)

using modmod method.

Rule list module.
